name: protegrity-data-protection
description: Enterprise-grade data protection for Cursor IDE. Detect PII, redact/mask sensitive data, and protect with tokenization. ⚠️ REQUIRES: Docker (PII discovery, redaction, guardrails) + API Credentials (protect/unprotect). Start with setup wizard after installation.
longDescription:
Comprehensive data protection suite using Protegrity AI Developer Edition APIs.

**Two Setup Tracks:**

🐳 **Local Services (Docker)** - Required for:
  • PII Detection & Classification
  • Data Redaction & Masking
  • Semantic Guardrails (conversation risk)
  • Synthetic Data Generation
  Setup: git clone + docker compose up (5-15 min)

🔑 **API Credentials** - Required for:
  • Protect Text (tokenization)
  • Unprotect Text (detokenization)
  Setup: Register account + set 3 env vars (10 min)

**Start Here:** Run "Protegrity: Setup Wizard" after installation to assess your requirements and gather prerequisites before diving in.
